description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem buses. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr, rarray = abusreal(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem buses to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the bus quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

string.description: Actual bus voltage magnitude, in pu.
Actual bus voltage magnitude, in kV (in pu if base voltage is 0.0).
Bus voltage phase angle, in radians.
Bus voltage phase angle, in degrees.
Normal high voltage limit, in pu.
Normal low voltage limit, in pu.
Emergency high voltage limit, in pu.
Emergency low voltage limit, in pu.
Bus mismatch, in MVA (0.0 if bus type code > 3).
Bus mismatch, in units determined by the power output option setting (0.0 if bus type code > 3).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
